title: gastrodia zeylanica
intro: Gastrodia zeylanica, also known as the Tiger Lily or Snake's Eye, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat neurological disorders and inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Gastrodia zeylanica include its potential to reduce anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of Parkinson's disease. In herbal preparations, Gastrodia zeylanica is often combined with other ingredients, such as ginseng and polygala, to create tonics and teas that support overall well-being and cognitive function.
